author: ben_a_adams
content: I prefer the 3rd one though does it deal with OOG differently? (is there a corner case)

author: draganrakita
content: It does handle oog differently.  Idea being that you spend 100gas, pop items from stack and do checks, if any of it fail, continue execution, you dont need to create new frame or load targets.

author: draganrakita
content: To note. I like my proposal (3th one), 1th is okay and 2th is just strange imo.

author: jwasinger
content: I looked into this.  For Geth, we will have to reorder checks in the gas handler in a way that will make the diff nontrivial

author: jwasinger
content: It's doable.  But doesn't really feel worth it to cover an edge-case that won't happen often enough to make a big difference

author: draganrakita
content: <@427903869226582018> you are saying this for the 3th option?

author: jwasinger
content: yeah, I'm saying that personally I think we should keep it as is

author: draganrakita
content: Sorry for being pain here, as is as 1th option 🙂
